questionHtml:
Which compounds react to form CH3CH2CH2COOCH(CH3)2?

 

A.   propanoic acid and propan-2-ol

B.   propanoic acid and butan-2-ol

C.   butanoic acid and propan-1-ol

D.   butanoic acid and propan-2-ol
